summary: Spanish home visual-editing pilot deployed to preview.senshac.com/es/: page 200, bridge 200, one Tina island, nine field markers, optimized home images 200. Remaining rollout still needs additional core/project pages.

Extended Tina visual editing from the Spanish home/about pilot to Spanish services. Deployed Pages build 9e939a99; preview.senshac.com/es/services returns 200 with 2 Tina islands, 62 data-tina-field markers, bridge injection, and Tina admin shows editable Services sections. Remaining rollout still includes project pages and any other core pages not yet converted.

Extended Tina visual editing to Spanish project detail pages using the projects_es collection and a project_es island. Deployed Pages build 8d193c82; preview.senshac.com/es/projects/la-trobada returns 200 with Tina bridge, 2 islands, 14 field markers, and Tina admin exposes project fields with Save/Reset. Catalan/English project detail routes remain non-Tina fallbacks.

Completed single-pass Tina visual editing rollout for Catalan and English across home, about, services, and project detail pages. Added ca/en loaders and island registry entries, widened existing island renderers to locale unions, and routed all locales through TinaIsland. Deployed Pages build 974287a0; preview.senshac.com smoke test passed for 12 routes with Tina bridge, 2 islands per route, and expected field counts.
